name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 claims per month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 claims per month, missed policy changes cause delayed claims approvals. We monitor policy changes and flag exceptions instead of manual tracking of policy changes through emails and documents.
target_audience: insurance brokers managing 10-20 claims per month
problem_solved: Inability to track policy changes leads to missed exceptions in claims processing.

locked_fields.primary_user: insurance brokers managing 10-20 claims per month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track policy changes leads to missed exceptions in claims processing.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 claims per month, missed policy changes cause delayed claims approvals. We monitor policy changes and flag exceptions instead of manual tracking of policy changes through emails and documents.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of policy changes through emails and documents

one_liner: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 claims per month, missed policy changes cause delayed claims approvals. We monitor policy changes and flag exceptions instead of manual tracking of policy changes through emails and documents.
